name: The Gilded Artichoke
signature_dish: lavender-rubbed roasted chicken and heirloom tomato tarts
description: The space feels like a high-end greenhouse with reclaimed wood and floor-to-ceiling windows.

name: Mar de Cortez
signature_dish: beer-battered snapper tacos and zesty octopus ceviche
description: Captures the salt-air energy of the coast, a premier spot for open-air dining near the pier.

name: Iron & Embers
signature_dish: 45-day dry-aged ribeye with bone marrow chimichurri
description: A space that smells deeply of white oak smoke and masculine sophistication.

name: Sakura Garden
signature_dish: buttery bluefin tuna belly
description: A quiet escape focused on seasonal perfection, a top-tier destination for serious sushi aficionados.

name: Pasta & Prose
signature_dish: theatrical table-side Cacio e Pepe tossed in a massive parmesan wheel
description: A see-and-be-seen hub where the energy is fueled by chilled prosecco.

name: The Golden Hummus
signature_dish: signature hummus topped with spiced wagyu beef
description: A bustling environment that makes every guest feel like part of a large, hungry family.

name: Velvet & Vine
signature_dish: duck confit sliders with curated small-batch European labels
description: A small-plates venue within a historic, exposed-brick setting providing a backdrop for evening dates.

name: The Neon Noodle Bar
signature_dish: numbing Dan Dan noodles and cumin lamb skewers
description: Attracts a younger crowd, all served under the glow of vibrant pink neon lights.

name: Sapphire Soul
signature_dish: spicy hot-honey fried chicken and waffles
description: Balances tradition with modern LA flair, as soulful and welcoming as the room itself.

name: The Obsidian Room
signature_dish: dry-aged sashimi treated like a work of art
description: A hushed, focused environment that feels worlds away from the city streets.

name: The Stone Hearth
signature_dish: foraged mushroom tart
description: A serene dining experience where the sound of the wind in the trees is the only soundtrack.

name: The Copper Pot
signature_dish: butter chicken pot pie and deconstructed samosas
description: An elegant space defined by rich copper accents and soft amber lighting.

name: Noche de Luz
signature_dish: crispy-bottomed paella with curated sherry list
description: Small plates with big impact, encouraging long, lingering evenings on a hidden back patio.

name: The Silk Road
signature_dish: saffron-infused Koobideh kabobs and herb-heavy stews
description: A room adorned with intricate Persian carpets and crystal chandeliers.

name: Blue Bayou
signature_dish: dark rich gumbo and spicy crawfish etouffee
description: Brings the flavors of New Orleans to the West Coast in a dim-lit room with live jazz.

name: Seoul Soul
signature_dish: premium wagyu cuts
description: Combines premium wagyu with a loud, rhythmic atmosphere perfect for starting a night out.

name: Common Thread
signature_dish: smoked koji-aged carrots
description: A chef-driven weekly-changing menu in a converted sewing factory with raw concrete and steel.

name: Midnight in Milan
signature_dish: elevated risotto and veal osso buco
description: A moody, high-ceilinged room in the Fashion District attracting a stylish, late-night crowd.

name: The French Laundry
signature_dish: nine-course prix-fixe menu where no ingredient is repeated
description: The crown jewel of Napa Valley, three-Michelin-starred with a surprisingly intimate farmhouse setting.

name: Chez Panisse
signature_dish: simple, perfect seasonal ingredients
description: Alice Waters' landmark that birthed the farm-to-table movement, a warm copper-lit sanctuary.
